title: LearnaOS
description: Turn any GitHub repo into a book-style course with one CLI command. Curated library with subscriptions, Clerk auth, and Stripe billing.
longDescription: LearnaOS converts GitHub repositories into structured, book-style learning experiences. Run `npx learnaos@latest owner/repo` on any repo or local folder to generate static HTML courses from markdown, Jupyter notebooks, and source files. The hosted platform at learnaos.com offers a curated course library with free previews, Starter subscriptions ($9/mo) for full access, and Pro plans with AI tutor, voice narration, and quizzes.
challenges: Converting heterogeneous repo structures into readable chapter hierarchies
Rendering Jupyter notebooks and multi-format source files consistently
Building subscription access with preview limits and paid tiers
solutions: Built an open-source CLI that auto-detects repo layout with zero config
Implemented notebook and code file renderers for book-style reading
Integrated Clerk auth, Stripe billing, and Neon DB for the hosted library

title: AI-Powered Notes for Medical Practitioners
description: A web application that allows medical practitioners to take notes, generate summaries, and extract key information using AI.
longDescription: NovateScribe revolutionizes how medical practitioners manage patient notes and documentation. Features include real-time transcription, AI-powered summarization, secure data storage, and HIPAA-compliant processing. The platform integrates with electronic health records and offers intelligent insights extraction.
solutions: Implemented end-to-end encryption with AWS KMS
Built audit logging system for HIPAA tracking
Integrated multiple AI models for accuracy

title: Carouslk
description: A modern carousel generator for images and videos with customizable themes, transitions, and responsive layouts.
longDescription: Carouslk is a powerful carousel creation tool that enables users to build beautiful, responsive carousels for images and videos. Features include customizable themes, smooth transitions, drag-and-drop reordering, multiple layout options, and export to various formats.

title: Audire
description: An AI-powered audio processing and enhancement tool that optimizes sound quality for podcasts and recordings.
longDescription: Audire is an intelligent audio enhancement platform that helps creators improve their audio recordings. Using advanced AI algorithms, it removes background noise, normalizes volume levels, enhances clarity, and applies professional-grade processing. Perfect for podcasters, musicians, and content creators.

title: 4casta
description: A modern URL shortener with analytics, custom aliases, and team collaboration features.
longDescription: 4casta is a feature-rich URL shortening service that combines simplicity with powerful analytics. Create memorable short links, track click data in real-time, manage team campaigns, and integrate with your workflow through APIs. Ideal for marketers, developers, and businesses.

title: Document Merger
description: A powerful browser-based tool that merges any combination of PDFs, Word documents, and images into organized multi-page files.
longDescription: Document Merger is a privacy-first utility that enables users to seamlessly combine multiple file formats including PDFs, Word documents, images, and spreadsheets. With an intuitive drag-and-drop interface, intelligent reordering, and multiple export formats, it simplifies document management without compromising data security.

title: ClinicDDI
description: An advanced Drug-Drug Interaction (DDI) checker equipped with AI to protect clinical decision-making.
longDescription: ClinicDDI is a sophisticated clinical decision support tool that uses AI to identify potential drug-drug interactions. Designed for healthcare professionals, it provides real-time alerts, evidentiary support for interactions, and suggests alternative medications to ensure patient safety in complex clinical environments.
